headlines: UK firm bombarded debt-ridden people with 5.5M texts
Telling internet platforms where to stick public service media will serve nobody. Turn it on its head

crew_quote: "5.5 million texts? Blimey, I can't even get a decent curry without my phone dying on me! Talk about debt and desperation—where's the love, man?"
